channel.title: Politics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Politics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: CIA retracts, revises 19 past intelligence assessments deemed politically biased
item.description: The CIA is retracting intelligence reports on reports that mostly relate to diversity, equity and inclusion after an internal review found political b...

item.title: 'Mostly Peaceful' Ohio Teens Skip School, Trash Grocery Store in Anti-ICE Melee
Campus Radicals Newsletter: Teacher who lost job over 2-word post breaks silence, Chicago 'racial segregation'
item.description: Stay up to date with the Fox News Campus Radicals newsletter, which brings you the in-depth investigative stories from college campuses nationwide.

item.title: THE ESSEX FILES: Kansas Was Right to Restore Common Sense on Bathrooms
Now It's Official: Trump Reveals the Administration's Path Forward After SCOTUS Scraps Tariffs

item.title: This Time It's the Trump-Kennedy Center That Vandals Target, Causing Performance Cancellation
Feel-Good Friday: Golden Doodle Abandoned at Las Vegas Airport Is Rescued, Garners Adoption Interest

item.description: Texas Senate Democratic primary between Rep. Jasmine Crockett, D-Texas, and Texas state Rep. James Talarico enters final stretch ahead of March 3 prim...

item.title: EPA scraps Biden coal restrictions, and advocates say move will restore American dominance
item.description: EPA Administrator Lee Zeldin reversed Biden-era mercury standards for coal plants, sparking praise from energy advocates for struggling coal communiti...
